Entry.JapaneseText: では、その友人の女性に伝えておいてくれ。 二度とパンを武器にしないように
Entry.EnglishText: So now, I need to tell your friend something for me. Never use bread as a weapon again.

Entry.JapaneseText: 一応、言っておく。 だが、あいつが素直に聞くとは思えないぞ
Entry.EnglishText: I'll let her know. I don't think she's just gonna quietly listen to that, though.

Entry.JapaneseText: そもそも私達も被害者なんだ。 彼女と一戦交えようものなら 容赦なくパンで殴られるのだからな
Entry.EnglishText: We're victims here too, to begin with. If you cross weapons with her in battle, she'll beat you mercilessly with her bread.

Entry.JapaneseText: パンで殴られるなんて 身体よりも心にダメージが残りそうね……
Entry.EnglishText: Being beaten with bread seems like it would leave more emotional damage than physical...

Entry.JapaneseText: 大丈夫だ。 いざとなったら 俺が直接その女性と話し合う
Entry.EnglishText: It'll be alright. If it comes down to it, I'll speak to the woman directly.

Entry.JapaneseText: パンによる秋雨のような 怒濤の突きが飛んでこようとも 俺は一歩も退くつもりはない
Entry.EnglishText: Even if her vigorous jabs are like an autumn rain of bread, I have no intention of withdrawing even one step.

Entry.JapaneseText: パンの気持ちは、俺が守り抜いてみせる！
Entry.EnglishText: I will make sure to protect the bread's feelings!
